strategyResults.details: Matches +16 claim; sprint files green in isolation too.

criteriaResults.description: Delta-join equals text; streamed deep-equal non-streamed
criteriaResults.evidence: Both branches call the SAME normalizeResponse (moved verbatim per git diff); paired-mock deep-equal green.
Streamed tool_use normalizes identically; deep-equal green.
Per-adapter tests: spy never called, no 'onTextDelta' in serialized request; only doc comments in source.
emitTextDelta conditional spread (key absent when unset); streamMock never called absent callback; paired-run deep-equal.
Stream errors reject un-swallowed (only per-delta cb try/catch'd); chatWithRetry/isTransientError untouched (:172-228 zero diff).

generatorFeedback.description: streaming+structured-output combination has no interaction test/guard: with both set, deltas may fire while text derives from the forced tool's JSON, breaking the delta-join==text guarantee in that combo. Not a contract violation; flag for whichever change first combines them.

summary: All 6 criteria independently verified; no SDK-type leakage outside anthropic.ts; no nonGoal violations; changed files match estimatedFiles (+the 4 test-only no-op tests). Iteration-1 pass.
